history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. Directly in front (row 06, column D) is lava (L), so moving forward is fatal. To the left (west) is a wall (#), so turning left is not useful. To the right (east) are floor cells (row 07, columns E, F, G). Row 06 is entirely lava in visible columns D-G, so moving north is impossible from any of these columns. Therefore, the only safe option is to turn right to face east and explore along row 07.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing east. Directly ahead is a wall (`#`) at column E, so moving forward is impossible. The cell to the left (north) at row 06, column D is a safe floor (`.`), while the cell to the right (south) is unseen. Turning left to face north is the safest choice to continue exploring along the clear vertical corridor in column D.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is lava, so moving forward is fatal. To my left (west) is a wall, to my right (east) is a safe floor (row 07, column E). Turning right is the only safe option to continue exploring along the clear path on row 07.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is a safe floor, while the cell to my left (row 07, column C) is lava, and to my right (row 07, column E) is a wall. The only safe move

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is a safe floor '.', while the cell to my left (row 07, column C) is lava 'L', and to my right (row 07, column E) is a wall '#'. I cannot move left or right. The only safe action is to move forward to explore further north and search for the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is floor and safe. Moving forward will bring us closer to the row 04 area where there are open floor cells to the west, which might lead to the goal. There is no immediate danger, and turning is unnecessary at this point.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is safe floor. Continuing north leads to row 05, which is a safe east-west corridor. The goal is not yet visible, and the east is blocked by a wall at column E. To explore further, it seems best to proceed north to row 05 and then head west into the unknown. No immediate danger.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is safe floor. Continuing north leads to more safe floor cells and avoids the lava on either side. The goal is not yet visible, but moving forward will bring us to a row that may allow turning west into unexplored areas. No immediate threat.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell ahead (row 06, column D) is safe floor. Continuing north is safe and will bring us to previously seen rows, potentially revealing more of the map. The goal is not yet visible, so moving forward is the best option.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell ahead (row 06, column D) is safe floor. However, the cell beyond that (row 05, column D) is a wall. I cannot turn left (lava at row 07, column C) or right (wall at row 07, column E). Moving forward to row 06, column D is safe and will reveal more of the map above, possibly showing a path to the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, blocked in front by a wall (#), to the west by lava (L), and to the east by a wall (#). The only unexplored direction is south. I will turn right (east) to start rotating, then turn right again to face south and explore behind me.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell ahead (D06) is a wall (#), and the cell to the left (C07) is also a wall. The cell to the right (E07) is an open floor. Turning right will allow me to face the open path and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 7, column C. The cell directly in front (north, row 6 column C) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. To my right (east) is a lava cell (L), so I cannot safely move there. To my left (west) is an unknown cell (?), which I should explore to find a path to the goal. I will turn left to face west, and then move forward into the unknown cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north, but my way forward is blocked by a wall at row 6, column C. To my right (east) there are open floor cells at row 7, columns D, E, F. I can turn right to face east and then move forward to explore that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east? Wait, the view is egocentric, so "up" in the grid is my current forward direction. In the current observation, the cell directly ahead of me (row 06, column D) is a floor `.`. The cell to my right (row 07, column E) is lava `L`. The cell to my left (column C) is a wall `#`. Since forward is safe, I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The forward cell (row 06, column D) is a floor `.`, which is safe to move into. The right and left cells are lava and wall respectively, so moving forward is the only safe option. The goal is not yet visible, so I should continue exploring.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing north. Ahead is a corridor of floor cells going north to row 03, where it hits a wall. My right (east) is a floor at row 07 column E, leading to an unexplored eastward corridor. If I move forward into row 06, the right side becomes lava, so I would lose access to this eastward path. It's better to explore the eastward passage now. I will turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
